This repo accepts PRs for docs, examples, Arabic translations, and site fixes.

## What does this PR change?

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes docs, examples, translations, or site code (not library code)
- [ ] `pnpm build`, `pnpm typecheck`, and `pnpm lint` pass
- [ ] Prose follows CONTRIBUTING.md style (plain English, no em dashes)
